title: ‘Ceasefire not open-ended’: Trump gives Iran ‘another three to five days’ to come up with unified proposal
summary_full: President Trump has reportedly given Iran a narrow three-to-five-day window to present a unified negotiation proposal. This limited ceasefire extension, requested by Pakistani leaders, aims to push Tehran to consolidate its position before Washington determines its next steps. The White House also announced Vice President Vance's trip to Pakistan for peace talks has been canceled.
